vulnerabilities.title: Denial of Service in http-proxy-agent
vulnerabilities.description:
Versions of `http-proxy-agent` before 2.1.0 are vulnerable to denial of service and uninitialized memory leak when unsanitized options are passed to `Buffer`. An attacker may leverage these unsanitized options to consume system resources.


## Recommendation

Update to version 2.1.0 or later.

vulnerabilities.title: Resource Exhaustion Denial of Service in http-proxy-agent
vulnerabilities.description: A flaw was found in http-proxy-agent, prior to version 2.1.0. It was discovered http-proxy-agent passes an auth option to the Buffer constructor without proper sanitization. This could result in a Denial of Service through the usage of all available CPU resources and data exposure through an uninitialized memory leak in setups where an attacker could submit typed input to the auth parameter.
